no-restricted-syntax.message: Use Role.ADMIN instead of string literal 'ADMIN'.
Use Role.USER instead of string literal 'USER'.
Use CourtStatus.ACTIVE instead of string literal 'ACTIVE'.
Use CourtStatus.INACTIVE instead of string literal 'INACTIVE'.
Use BookingStatus.PENDING_PAYMENT instead of string literal.
Use BookingStatus.CONFIRMED instead of string literal.
Use BookingStatus.CANCELLED instead of string literal.
Use BookingStatus.COMPLETED instead of string literal.
Use BookingStatus.EXPIRED instead of string literal.
